message:
Add time-travel/version query support

SQL: SELECT * FROM read_lance('url') AT VERSION 1 LIMIT 50
DataFrame: lanceql.open("url", version=1)

- Add AT/VERSION keywords to SQL lexer and parser
- Update RemoteLanceDataset to accept version option
- Add listVersions() method to get available versions
- Show version in UI when loading specific version
- Add "Version 1" example button in SQL examples
- Update DataFrame code generator and parser for version
